title: notifications-in-app — retention windows
description: The in-app transport does not own a separate table — read/dismiss state lives on notifications::NotificationDelivery. This retention doc declares TRANSPORT-SPECIFIC windows that override the parent module's defaults for in-app-flavored rows.

hot.description: Six months hot in the primary table. In-app bell content is more ephemeral than mail — users don't reference year-old alerts.

cold.description: Migrated to notifications_delivery_archive after 180 days. Retained for one year total.

note: The parent notifications module defines default retention for all channels; this file overrides only where in-app differs. Broadcast messages themselves are ephemeral (WebSocket frames not persisted) — the persistent state is the NotificationDelivery row.
